subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all fancy and conjecture, beyond all mention and utterance, befitteth the Most Holy and Most Exalted Court of the Desire of all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از اوهام و ظنون و ذکر و بیان ساحت عز امنع اقدس مقصود عالمیان را لایق
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God, @suffering and imprisonment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @goodly deeds; actions, @prayer for peace and unity
